summary.ja: 2026年6月29日の週次暗号資産マーケット分析では、主要な暗号資産の多くがほぼ横ばいな動きを見せている。[Bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin)を含む多くのコインが小幅な下落または上昇を予測しており、市場全体の予測変動は限られたものとなっている。

body.en:
The crypto market is expected to remain relatively stable for the week of 2026-06-29, with the BitPredictable LSTM AI model predicting flat movements for most major coins. [Bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) is forecasted to decrease by 0.84% with a confidence of 80%, while [ethereum](/coins/ethereum) and [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin) are predicted to drop by 0.97% and 0.67% respectively. On the other hand, [solana](/coins/solana) and [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) are expected to see slight increases of 0.99% and 3.15% respectively, although with lower confidence levels.

## Key Signals This Week
The AI model's predictions are largely bearish, with [ripple](/coins/ripple) expected to decrease by 1.05% with a high confidence of 84%. This suggests that the market may be due for a correction after recent gains. However, the predicted increase in [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) could be a sign of investor appetite for riskier assets.

## Trading Agent Update
The Trading Agent, crypto-ace, had a strong week with a 6-1 win-loss record and an 86% win rate on 7 trades. This suggests that the agent's signal quality was high, and it was able to capitalize on market movements. The agent's cumulative return remains negative at -1.43%, but the Sharpe ratio of -2.50 indicates that the agent is taking on significant risk.

## What to Watch
Recent news headlines, such as the [US Treasury sanctions on ISIS-K crypto addresses](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/02/us-treasury-sanctions-over-100-isis-k-crypto-addresses-in-latest-enforcement-action), may have implications for the market. Additionally, the shutdown of SBI Crypto's mining pool, which holds roughly 2% of [Bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin)'s hashrate, could lead to increased market volatility. This is not investment advice.

## In the News

US Treasury sanctions over 100 ISIS-K crypto addresses that moved over $1.4 million ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/02/us-treasury-sanctions-over-100-isis-k-crypto-addresses-in-latest-enforcement-action))

SBI Crypto to shut down mining pool that holds roughly 2% of Bitcoin's hashrate ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/02/sbi-crypto-to-shut-down-mining-pool-that-holds-roughly-2-of-bitcoin-s-hashrate))

Ondo Finance debuts SEC-aligned tokenized stock model with BlackRock ETF, Micron shares ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/01/ondo-finance-debuts-sec-aligned-tokenized-stock-model-with-blackrock-etf-micron-shares))
body.ja:
2026年6月29日の週次暗号資産マーケット分析では、主要な暗号資産の多くがほぼ横ばいな動きを見せている。[Bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin)を含む多くのコインが小幅な下落または上昇を予測しており、市場全体の予測変動は限られたものとなっている。

## 注目シグナル
特に注目すべきは[dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin)の予測上昇率が3.15%と相対的に高くなっている点である。また、[ripple](/coins/ripple)の予測下落率は-1.05%と予測下落コインの中では相対的に高い水準にある。[CoinDesk]での[US Treasury sanctions over 100 ISIS-K crypto addresses that moved over $1.4 million](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/02/us-treasury-sanctions-over-100-isis-k-crypto-addresses-in-latest-enforcement-action)の報道も、市場の規制強化の動きを示唆している。

## トレードエージェントの状況
トレードエージェント「crypto-ace」の統計によると、累積リターンは-1.43%、勝率は47%となっている。ただし、Sharpe ratioは-2.50と低水準にある。この週のエージェントのパフォーマンスは強かったと言えるが、全体的なトレード成績には課題が残っている。

## 来週のチェックポイント
来週の市場動向を読む上で、[Cointelegraph]の[The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026](https://cointelegraph.com/features/the-biggest-blockchain-upgrades-still-to-come-in-2026?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound)のような技術的アップデートや、[CoinDesk]の[JPMorgan says Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds 'two-way risk' to crypto markets](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/02/jpmorgan-says-strategy-s-bitcoin-sales-policy-adds-two-way-risk-to-crypto-markets)のような市場分析が重要な指標となることが予想される。

投資助言ではありません
